Boys and girls, may I have your attention, please? This week, several events will take place at Science World. On Tuesday afternoon, there will be a computer workshop, and you will get to learn about computers. On Wednesday morning, you will have the chance to do some experiments with water. The regular Saturday evening talk is going to have a famous American scientist coming from New York. He will talk about future life. It isn't expensive to visit Science World, with tickets priced at 3 pounds for adults and 1.75 pounds for children. If you want to go to a special event or talk, then book your tickets directly from Science World at 3726558, or pick them up from the tourist office.

That's all. Thank you.
